where.if: AND (1=0 OR c.member_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR c.contact_title ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND c.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND c.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND c.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND c.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyContact :: selectById */ c.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_cs.code_label AS contact_status_cd_nm FROM sy_contact c LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cs ON cd_cs.code_grp = 'CONTACT_STATUS' AND cd_cs.code_value = c.contact_status_cd WHERE c.contact_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyContact :: selectList */ c.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_cs.code_label AS contact_status_cd_nm FROM sy_contact c LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cs ON cd_cs.code_grp = 'CONTACT_STATUS' AND cd_cs.code_value = c.contact_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.sy :: SyContact :: selectPageList */ c.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_cs.code_label AS contact_status_cd_nm FROM sy_contact c LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cs ON cd_cs.code_grp = 'CONTACT_STATUS' AND cd_cs.code_value = c.contact_status_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(c.*) /* base.sy :: SyContact :: selectPageCount */ FROM sy_contact c
